remember: Students will be able to recall the different types of plans and their characteristics.
Students will be able to identify the various stages involved in the planning process.
Students will be able to explain the importance of planning in business organizations.
understand: Students will be able to understand the role of planning in achieving business objectives.
Students will be able to comprehend the relationship between planning and other business functions.
Students will be able to analyze the impact of internal and external factors on the planning process.
apply: Students will be able to apply the planning process to a given business scenario.
Students will be able to prepare a simple business plan using the planning process.
Students will be able to identify and evaluate the strengths and weaknesses of a business plan.
analyze: Students will be able to analyze the effectiveness of a business plan in achieving its objectives.
Students will be able to evaluate the impact of changes in the business environment on the planning process.
Students will be able to identify and suggest improvements to a business plan.

ncert_objectives: Explain the concept and characteristics of planning.
Discuss the planning process and its stages.
Describe the importance of planning in business organizations.
board_exam_objectives: Explain the different types of plans (short-term, medium-term, and long-term).
Discuss the role of planning in achieving business objectives.
Evaluate the impact of internal and external factors on the planning process.
